steps.assistant_text: Vtable-entry dispatcher; byte-identical twin of the just-landed timproc_uso_b1_func_00001130. The NM body had a single residual: the address addu emitted product-rs (`addu rd,prod,base`) where the target emits base-rs (`addu rd,base,prod`), coupled to the $t9 coalesce. Ported the twin's two semantic-no-op coloring nudges directly (swapping b3's symbols/offsets): `self[(0x48/4) ^ 0]` (identity XOR re-orders the index web to base-rs while keeping the $t9 coalesce) and `(new_var = 0x90)` (parks the +0x90 offset in a throwaway local, fixing the call-register temp number). Immediate land, no permuter needed. Verified in-tree exact, not an isolated false-100.

metadata.verification: in-tree exact: 40/40 words, 0 non-reloc diffs, reloc records at 6 target offsets (D_arg_b3_10E4 HI16/LO16, gl_func_00000000 x2 jal, D_cur_b3_10E4 HI16/LO16); ROM byte-identical to baserom; ported twin lever from timproc_uso_b1_func_00001130
